text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey. This is between you and me…

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But if ya wanna add volume to your food, 
you should add tofu!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just add it to your stir-fry or whatever, 
and it'll soak all the flavors up, bringin' 
your dish to the next level!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You can buy tofu anywhere, and it really 
fills ya up! Give it a try sometime!
